nasb.text: When Jehu came to Jezreel, Jezebel heard of it, and she painted her eyes and adorned her head and looked out the window.

esv.text: When Jehu came to Jezreel, Jezebel heard of it. And she painted her eyes and adorned her head and looked out of the window.

cnv.text: 耶戶到了耶斯列。耶洗別已經聽聞，就塗眼梳頭，從窗戶裡往外觀望。

ccb.text: 耶户去了耶斯列。耶洗别闻讯，便梳头描眉，向窗外眺望。
